'''鈭歳-l-th-j''' ('''karalthejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alienize|alienize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alienize|alienize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-l-th-j
|-
! Lemma
| karalthejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiralthejoko|thiralthejoko]] || [[word:jiralthejoko|jiralthejoko]] || [[word:shiralthejoko|shiralthejoko]] || [[word:kiralthejoko|kiralthejoko]]
